ddls:
CREATE TABLE "polls" (
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll */,
  "question" TEXT /* The question asked in the poll */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the polling period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the polling period */,
  "pollster_id" INTEGER /* The organization conducting the poll */,
  "population" TEXT /* Description of the population surveyed */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the poll */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the poll results */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the poll (e.g., online, phone, in-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_pollster_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollster_id") REFERENCES pollster_details ("pollster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll result entry */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated poll */,
  "support_level" REAL /* Overall support level for the question */,
  "republican_support" REAL /* Support level among Republicans */,
  "democratic_support" REAL /* Support level among Democrats */,
  "independent_support" REAL /* Support level among Independents */,
  "undecided" REAL /* Percentage of respondents who are undecided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_results_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollster_details" (
  "pollster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollster */,
  "pollster_name" TEXT /* Name of the polling organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the polling organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the polling organization */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the polling organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the surveyed individuals */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the surveyed individuals */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level classification of the surveyed individuals */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the surveyed individuals */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the surveyed individuals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link entry */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated poll */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL where more information about the poll can be found */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of link (e.g., results, methodology, dataset) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_links_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the poll */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the poll was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll the feedback is about */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category entry */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated poll */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_categories_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result entry */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated poll */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of findings from the poll */,
  "trends" TEXT /* Identified trends from the data */,
  "conclusions" TEXT /* Conclusions drawn from the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_analysis_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollster_polls" (
  "pollster_poll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollster-poll entry */,
  "pollster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polling organization */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollster_poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollster_polls_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollster_polls_pollster_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollster_id") REFERENCES pollster_details ("pollster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_demographics" (
  "poll_demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll-demographic entry */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_demographics_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_demographics_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic entry */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated poll */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_topics_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question entry */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated poll */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_questions_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)
